response: [Mr. Smith] received his property tax bill in three installments. The first installment was [1,200], the second installment was [1,350], and the third installment was [1,500]. In addition, he received a tax rebate of [250] for early payment. The total amount he paid for his property taxes this year is [1,200 + 1,350 + 1,500] = [4,050]. After accounting for the rebate, he paid [4,050 - 250] = [3,800].
